aesthetic: 3D gradiental style with white, royal blue, and metallic gold accents. Clean, official, celebratory.

colors.3d_gradient_css: radial-gradient(circle at 10% 20%, rgba(15, 60, 138, 0.05) 0%, transparent 90%), radial-gradient(circle at 90% 80%, rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.08) 0%, transparent 90%)

hierarchy.h1_hero: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black text-primary

kiosk_voting_flow.strategy: Single task per screen (1 contest at a time). Massive touch targets.
kiosk_voting_flow.container: max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-12 min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-center
kiosk_voting_flow.alignment: Center-aligned headers, left-aligned candidate details to support scanning.

admin_dashboard.cards: col-span-1 for summaries, col-span-2 or 3 for charts.

kiosk.candidate_card: Glassmorphism surface: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-xl rounded-3xl p-6. Hover/Active: scale-105 ring-4 ring-accent_gold transition-all duration-300.
kiosk.progress_bar: Thick (h-4) rounded-full bg-blue-100, indicator bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-accent_gold.
kiosk.buttons: Large (h-16), rounded-2xl, text-xl font-bold. Primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary_hover shadow-lg. CTA: bg-gradient-to-r from-accent_gold to-yellow-500 text-text_main.
kiosk.inputs: Oversized, h-16, text-center text-3xl tracking-widest for Admission Number. Use Shadcn Input customized.

admin_dashboard.cards: Solid flat bg-white, 1px subtle border-border_subtle, rounded-xl. No heavy shadows.
admin_dashboard.tables: Shadcn Table, dense padding, alternating row colors (bg-gray-50/50).
admin_dashboard.charts: Recharts Bar/Pie charts using primary and accent_gold colors.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used on Kiosk screens to let the 3D gradient background bleed through slightly. Requires backdrop-saturate-150 and backdrop-blur-2xl.
visual_enhancers.neumorphism_touches: Use 1px inner solid white borders (border-white/60) on cards to give a 3D bevel effect.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient colored shadows: shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(15,60,138,0.12)] for cards.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer Motion: fade in and slide up (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1) with spring physics.
motion_and_interactions.selection_feedback: Instant haptic-style visual pop. When candidate selected, card border turns Gold, checkmark icon scales in.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons must lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow. Text color must remain WCAG compliant.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. High contrast focus rings (focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on Royal Blue passes APCA. Dark text on White passes.
accessibility_and_testing.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48px on all interactive elements in Kiosk mode.

school_crest.usage: Top center of Kiosk auth and Thank You screens. Admin dashboard sidebar.

media.icons_library: lucide-react (for UI elements), custom SVG or Phosphor icons for election symbols (e.g. Star, Sun, Book, Tree).

instructions_to_main_agent.architecture: Build two distinct layouts: 1) Kiosk Layout (no nav bar, immersive full-screen, 3D CSS mesh gradient background, single-flow steps). 2) Admin Dashboard Layout (sidebar navigation, flat white background, high-density data tables).
instructions_to_main_agent.state_management: Use React state/context for the voting flow. The flow is: Auth -> Identity Confirm -> Head Boy -> Head Girl -> Sports Skipper -> Cultural Head -> Discipline Head -> Thank You.
instructions_to_main_agent.css_implementation: To achieve the '3D gradiental' style without heavy WebGL, use complex CSS radial gradients on the Kiosk wrapper: bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-blue-50 via-white to-blue-100. Add floating orbs using absolute positioned divs with blur-3xl in primary blue and gold.
instructions_to_main_agent.dependencies: Install framer-motion, recharts (for admin dashboard), lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge, xlsx (for parsing excel uploads). Use Shadcn for standard components but strip borders/shadows for Kiosk in favor of Glassmorphism.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: Ensure EVERY button and input has the specified data-testid for end-to-end testing.
instructions_to_main_agent.backend_storage: User explicitly requested 'local database, we don't host it on any online server'. Implement the backend with Python FastAPI + SQLite to store data locally on the host machine. Ensure Admin Dashboard has candidate CRUD (with local file upload or URL) and Excel upload functionality for student records.
